results.rendered_html:
ramā [ramayati ram-ac]
1 A wife, mistress.
2 N. of Lakṣmī, the wife of Viṣṇu, and Goddess of wealth.
3 Good luck, fortune.
4 Riches.
5 Splendour.
6 N. of the eleventh day in the dark half of Kārtika.
Comp.
— kāṃtaḥ, -nāthaḥ,
— patiḥ epithets of Viṣṇu.
— priyaḥ Viṣṇu.
— (yaṃ) a lotus.
— veṣṭaḥ turpentine.
